creator: jilles@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thank you for your bug report. 

Unfortunately, the FreeBSD bug tracking system is primarily meant for 
tracking bugs, not support requests, and the Depenguinator is not an 
official FreeBSD tool and therefore problems with it cannot be tracked 
here. I think it is a tool for people who know what they are doing. I 
suggest contacting its author or sending a question to an appropriate 
mailing list or forum. 

If you want to ask in German, then please use a German-language forum 
as not all people working on the main freebsd.org mailing lists and 
bug tracker can understand German.
